---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a substrate-generic addition or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: feature
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What fork-creator pain (or substrate gap) motivates this? Concrete is better than abstract — name a real scenario where the absence bites.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like Inkwell to do. API sketch / config shape / component prop is welcome but not required.

## Alternatives considered

What else you tried, or what other approaches you considered. Knowing the alternatives helps reviewers see why this shape won.

## Substrate-generic vs fork-specific

- [ ] **Substrate-generic** — any Inkwell fork could benefit. Goes upstream.
- [ ] **Fork-specific** — only my fork (or a narrow class of forks) needs this. Stays in the fork.

If you're unsure, default to substrate-generic and let the steward call it.

## Additional context

<!-- Links to related issues, prior discussions, references. -->
